title: fix: remove duplicate title in community diary
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Echo echo no more
gist.blurb: We fixed a little hiccup where diary entries were repeating their titles. Now you can read the community updates without the echo.
gist.summary: Fixed an issue in the community diary where entry titles were being duplicated at the start of the summary text.
gist.impact: Diary entries on the website now display cleanly without repeating the headline.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about fixing duplicate text in a diary. Visual symbols: a diary/journal, text, and the Nomnom creature eating the duplicate words. The bee mascot is writing or reading.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round nomnom creature happily eating duplicate pixelated text from a large open diary book, while the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses watches amused. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
